attempts.prompt:
You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate a step-by-step plan for the robot(s).
    All the possible actions and their arguments are given below:
    ['pick-up (?x - block ?robot - robot)', 'put-down (?x - block ?robot - robot)', 'stack (?x - block ?y - block ?robot - robot)', 'unstack (?x - block ?y - block ?robot - robot)']

    You must first reason what objects are in the scene that can be the arguments of the actions.
    Then you must reason what actions to take in the plan. Be mindful of the preconditions and effects of the actions.
    Each action should take one line in the plan.
    The plan should be in the following format:
    (action1 arg1 arg2 arg3)
    (action2 arg1 arg2 arg3)
    ...
    
    For the current domain,
    You can always assume that at least one robot arm is available if not in the image.
    
        The image of the scene has been provided.
        Please first analyze the image and then generate the plan.
        Do not generate anything after the plan.
        
    Instruction: Create 1 stacks: orange over purple over green over blue over yellow over red
    Please generate the plan for the robot. Do not generate anything after the plan.
attempts.response:
(unstack orange red robot)
(put-down orange robot)
(unstack red yellow robot)
(put-down red robot)
(unstack yellow purple robot)
(put-down yellow robot)
(pick-up red robot)
(stack red yellow robot)
(pick-up blue robot)
(stack blue red robot)
(pick-up green robot)
(stack green blue robot)
(pick-up purple robot)
(stack purple green robot)
(pick-up orange robot)
(stack orange purple robot)
attempts.plan:
(unstack orange red robot)
(put-down orange robot)
(unstack red yellow robot)
(put-down red robot)
(unstack yellow purple robot)
(put-down yellow robot)
(pick-up red robot)
(stack red yellow robot)
(pick-up blue robot)
(stack blue red robot)
(pick-up green robot)
(stack green blue robot)
(pick-up purple robot)
(stack purple green robot)
(pick-up orange robot)
(stack orange purple robot)
